value.title: a16z VC wants founders to stop stressing over insane ARR numbers
value.content: Andreessen Horowitz VC Jennifer Li⁠, who oversees some of the firm's fastest-growing AI companies, warns founders not to believe every ARR claim made on X.

value.title: Fundamental raises $255M Series A with a new take on big data analysis
value.content: Fundamental has built a new foundation model to solve an old problem: how to draw insights from the huge quantities of structured data produced by enterprises.

value.title: Stripe alumni raise €30M Series A for Duna, backed by Stripe and Adyen execs
value.content: Having raised a €30 million Series A round led by CapitalG, business identity verification startup Duna is now among the most well-capitalized European startups founded by Stripe alumni.

value.title: Meet Gizmo: A TikTok for interactive, vibe-coded mini apps
value.content: Gizmo's app is like a TikTok for vibe-coded mini apps... and it's a lot of fun.

value.title: AI SRE Resolve AI confirms $125M raise, unicorn valuation
value.content: The two-year-old startup confirms that it closed a Series A led by Lightspeed at $1 billion valuation.

value.title: Lunar Energy raises $232M to deploy home batteries that prop up the grid
value.content: The startup has raised more than $500 million, to date, from investors to build a massive, distributed power plant supported by residential batteries.

value.title: ElevenLabs raises $500M from Sequoia at an $11 billion valuation
value.content: ElevenLabs' valuation has raised more than three times in the last 12 months.

value.title: Accel doubles down on Fibr AI as agents turn static websites into one-to-one experiences
value.content: Fibr AI replaces marketing agency- and engineering-heavy website personalization with autonomous systems designed for enterprise scale.

value.title: Exclusive: Positron raises $230M Series B to take on Nvidia’s AI chips
value.content: The investment comes from backers including the Qatar Investment Authority as demand for chips beyond Nvidia soars and as Qatar aims to build out its AI infrastructure.

value.title: Epstein-linked longevity guru Peter Attia leaves David Protein, and his own startup ‘won’t comment’
value.content: Attia co-founded longevity medical testing startup Biograph, which came out of stealth a year ago.

value.title: India’s Varaha bags $20M to scale carbon removal from the Global South
value.content: Varaha's fresh funding is part of a $45 million Series B round led by WestBridge Capital.

value.title: The Minneapolis tech community holds strong during ‘tense and difficult time’
value.content: Founders and investors in the Minneapolis tech industry told TechCrunch they've put much of their work on hold to help out their community.

value.title: YC startups can now receive investment in stablecoin
value.content: All startups accepted into YC will soon have the option to receive their seed checks via stablecoins.

value.title: 2026 plans: What’s next for Startup Battlefield 200
value.content: See what to expect for Startup Battlefield 200 in 2026, the ultimate startup pitch competition on the global stage at TechCrunch Disrupt. Join the mailing list to be the first to know when applications drop.

value.title: Skyryse lands another $300M to make flying, even helicopters, simple and safe
value.content: Skyrsye, now valued at $1.15 billion, is pushing to get FAA certification for its universal operating system for flight.

value.title: Gradient’s heat pumps get new smarts to enable old-building retrofits
value.content: Gradient's heat pumps fit in windows, minimizing installation times. Now, it is introducing software to make those units more intelligent.

value.title: Fitbit founders launch AI platform to help families monitor their health
value.content: Luffu uses AI in the background to gather and organize family information, learn day-to-day patterns, and flag notable changes so families can stay aligned and address potential well-being issues.

value.title: Peak XV says internal disagreement led to partner exits as it doubles down on AI
value.content: Peak XV is transitioning board roles and opening a U.S. office while continuing to view India as its largest market.

value.title: Two Stanford students launch $2M startup accelerator for students nationwide
value.content: "Breakthrough’s purpose is to fill in the funding and opportunity gap that exists in many of these ecosystems because students have historically lacked access to capital and the networks required to launch their entrepreneurial pursuits," co-founder Roman Scott said.

value.title: Carbon Robotics built an AI model that detects and identifies plants
value.content: Carbon Robotics' Large Plant Model will allow farmers to kill new types of weeds without having to retrain the machines.
